Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $132,384,315Details
International Box Office $157,276,304
Worldwide Box Office $289,660,619
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $143,781,802
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $4,245,015
Total $148,026,817
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$26,887,467 (20.3% of total gross)
Legs:4.92 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:45.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$90,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,017 opening theaters/3,017 max. theaters, 8.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $240,674,536

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 6th, 2006 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: November 23rd, 2006 (Limited), released as The Departed (디파티드) (South Korea)
December 4th, 2020 (Limited) (Australia)
Video Release: February 13th, 2007 by Warner Home Video
February 19th, 2007 by Entertainment in Video
MPA Rating: R for strong brutal violence, pervasive language, some strong sexual content and drug material.
Running Time: 151 minutes
Award nomination: 2007 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Award win: Critics’ Choice Winner Best Director, Critics’ Choice Winner Best Picture, Directors Guild of America Outstanding Directorial Achievement in Theatrical Feature Film Winner, Golden Globe Winner Best Director—Motion Picture, Oscars Best Picture Winner, Writers Guild of America Best Adapted Screenplay Winner
Cast, crew, or production detail: Foreign-Language Remake, Remake
Plot point: Corrupt Cops, Undercover
Social setting: Film Noir
Subgenre: Crime Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Initial Entertainment Group, Plan B Entertainment, Vertigo Films, Media Asia Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
